_doc: Config for scripts/lint-html-views.mjs (WC7c). Paths are relative to plan-dashboard/. Rule text: docs/standards/html-view-quality.md; digest: docs/standards/html-view-quality-digest.md.

src/components/PipelineOverviewRail.tsx: INLINE-STYLE — dynamic SVG interaction state (zoom transform, dimmed opacity, data-driven fill); legitimate per the conflict rule (WC6 remaining_followon)

_notes.src/layouts/NarrativeBase.astro: Pre-existing WARN follow-on: inline <style> body (INLINE-STYLE-BLOCK) + missing skip-link (SKIP-LINK). Tracked, not silently rewritten — per-view shell changes are discussed one at a time.
_notes.scope: Blocking gate covers the 12 top-level architecture view pages + shared layouts (confirmed green 2026-05-29). Non-view subpages (book-review/library/wisdom) and interactive app surfaces (reader/, ui/) are WARN or excluded by design.
